scheme.scheme_name: HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund Direct Growth

facts.exit_load: Exit Load for units in excess of 15% of the investment,1% will be charged for redemption within 1 year.
facts.taxation: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.title: Overview
sections.text: HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund is a Dynamic Asset Allocation Hybrid mutual fund offered by HDFC Mutual Fund. Its riskometer classification is Moderately High. Its benchmark index is NIFTY 50 Hybrid Composite Debt 50:50 Index. The fund manager is Srinivas Rao Ravuri. It was launched on 01-Jan-2013. Its ISIN is INF179K01WA6.

sections.title: Fees and Charges
sections.text: The expense ratio of HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund is 0.75%. The exit load is: Exit Load for units in excess of 15% of the investment,1% will be charged for redemption within 1 year. Stamp duty is 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020).

sections.title: Investment Limits
sections.text: The minimum SIP investment is ₹100. The minimum lumpsum (one-time) investment is ₹100. The minimum additional investment is ₹100. The minimum withdrawal amount is ₹100. Lock-in: No lock-in period. SIP investment is allowed.

sections.title: Taxation
sections.text: Taxation for HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund (category: Hybrid): If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.title: Fund Size and NAV
sections.text: The assets under management (AUM) is approximately ₹105,377.65 crore. The latest NAV is ₹551.346 as of 29-May-2026.

sections.title: Fund House and Registrar
sections.text: The registrar and transfer agent (RTA) for HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund is CAMS. The AMC (HDFC Mutual Fund) registered address is "HDFC House", 2nd Floor, H. T. Parekh Marg, 165-166, BackbayReclamation, Churchgate Mumbai 400020.

sections.title: Scheme Description
sections.text: The Scheme seeks to provide long term capital appreciation / income from a dynamic mix of equity and debt investments.
